title: oberonia rufilabris var. nepalensis
intro: Oberonia rufilabris var. nepalensis, commonly known as a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia rufilabris var. nepalensis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
